skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>1password</name>
    <description>Set up and use 1Password CLI for sign-in, desktop integration, and reading or injecting secrets.</description>
    <location>~/Library/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.4.25/node_modules/openclaw/skills/1password/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>a-share-fusion-report</name>
    <description>Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/a-share-fusion-report/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>acp-router</name>
    <description>Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.</description>
    <location>~/Library/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.4.25/node_modules/openclaw/dist/extensions/acpx/skills/acp-router/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>

    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.</description>

resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: Enhance LLM agent data integrity and token efficiency via a pointer-based  memory system and multi-layered context compression. 通过指针式记忆系统和多层上下文压缩，提升 LLM Agent 的数据一致性与 Token 效率。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task

(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl

Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

## Goal
- 升级 OpenClaw 本体到最新版本
- 修改定时任务设置，让非交易日不执行盘前强检、不推送消息

## Constraints & Preferences
- 非交易日不执行盘前强检，不推送任何消息
- sudo/elevated exec 不可用（runtime=direct）

## Progress
### Done
- [x] OpenClaw 从 2026.4.27 (cbc2ba0) 升级到 2026.5.2 (8b2a6e5)
- [x] Gateway 重启使新版本生效
- [x] `每日09:30盘前强检-v2` cron 表达式从 `30 9 * * *`（每天）改为 `30 9 * * 1-5`（仅周一至周五）
- [x] 确认其他投研相关定时任务已经是 `1-5`（无遗漏）

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none - 所有任务已完成)

## Key Decisions
- **升级方式**: 使用 fnm exec 安装到用户级 prefix（避免 /usr/local 权限问题），因 sudo 需要终端交互不可用
- **Cron 修改**: 使用 `openclaw cron edit --cron` 直接修改 cron 表达式，而非删除重建

## Next Steps
1. 明天周一（5月4日）09:30 验证盘前强检任务是否正常触发，非交易日是否静默

## Goal
Build an **Event Radar Scanner** (事件雷达持仓扫描器) — Step 1 of a 3-step premarket intelligence pipeline. The scanner cross-references events from `stocks.matraceai.com` API against the user's 41 A-share holdings (and optional watchlist), producing structured JSON output for consumption by other scripts and Feishu push.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Must use `real_holdings_source.py` (`resolve_real_holdings(include_auto=False)`) for holdings data
- Must output JSON (cacheable) + optional plain-text report
- API is slow (~5.4s/page, 476 total events = ~130s full scan) — needs optimization
- Non-trading days should be handled
- Cache recent events locally to avoid redundant API calls

## Key Decisions
- **Scanner location**: Placed in `/Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/scripts/event_radar_scanner.py`
- **Cache strategy**: Daily JSON cache in `data/event_radar/events_YYYYMMDD.json`, auto-cleanup of files >7 days old via `_clean_old_cache()`
- **Matching threshold**: `MIN_RELEVANCE_SCORE = 0.5` (relevance_score from API); `HIGH_IMPACT_THRESHOLD = 0.15` (expectation_score)

- **Scoring**: Matches include `expectation_score` with directional indicators (🟢 pos, 🔴 < -0.3, 🟡 neutral)

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.description: Enhance LLM agent data integrity and token efficiency via a pointer-based  memory system and multi-layered context compression. 通过指针式记忆系统和多层上下文压缩，提升 LLM Agent 的数据一致性与 Token 效率。

Use when you need to search via DuckDuckGo/Brave/Google (multi-page), extract readable text from URLs, browse interactively with a persistent visible browser (with tabs, click, screenshot, text search), download files/PDFs, or dismiss cookie banners. Supports JSON/markdown/text output. Powered by Playwright + Chromium.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description: XiaoHongShu (Little Red Book) data collection and interaction toolkit. Use when working with XiaoHongShu (小红书) platform for: (1) Searching and scraping notes/posts, (2) Getting user profiles and details, (3) Extracting comments and likes, (4) Following users and liking posts, (5) Fetching home feed and trending content. Automatically handles all encryption parameters (cookies, headers) including a1, webId, x-s, x-s-common, x-t, sec_poison_id, websectiga, gid, x-b3-traceid, x-xray-traceid. Supports guest mode and authenticated sessions via web_session cookie.

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

**触发场景**：
(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据
(2) 用户要求设置定时备份
(3) 用户询问备份配置、状态、日志
(4) 用户执行 /backup_now、/backup_status、/backup_config、/backup_list、/backup_clean 等命令
(5) HEARTBEAT 触发定时备份检查

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: Enhance LLM agent data integrity and token efficiency via a pointer-based  memory system and multi-layered context compression. 通过指针式记忆系统和多层上下文压缩，提升 LLM Agent 的数据一致性与 Token 效率。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description: XiaoHongShu (Little Red Book) data collection and interaction toolkit. Use when working with XiaoHongShu (小红书) platform for: (1) Searching and scraping notes/posts, (2) Getting user profiles and details, (3) Extracting comments and likes, (4) Following users and liking posts, (5) Fetching home feed and trending content. Supports guest mode and authenticated sessions via web_session cookie.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.
